title: oqs-cbg-pipeline: Numerical implementation of the Colla–Breuer–Gasbarri minimal-dissipation effective-Hamiltonian framework
description:
Sail-internal repository implementing the basis-independent operational expression and recursive perturbative expansion for the effective Hamiltonian K(t) of non-Markovian open quantum systems under the Hayden–Sorce minimal-dissipation gauge. Anchored to Council-cleared Breakwater Ledger entry CL-2026-005 v0.4.

Outputs are coordinate-dependent under the chosen gauge. See docs/do_not_cite_as.md for citation prohibitions.
notes: At v0.1.0, no Decision Gate (DG-1 through DG-5 per Sail v0.5 §9) has yet been passed. The repository is a scaffold; outputs at this version have demonstration value only. Live DG status: docs/validity_envelope.md.
